series_metadata.series_description: Provides information about the status of Nursing facilities & resthomes. Included are survey reports, application to license, permanent license, license renewals, plans of correction, enforcement action, variance requests, number of beds, correspondence,

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 years then destroy, provided that no legal action is to be taken against the facility and all appeals have been resolved., Paper: Shred
